input_dict.question: NFL Street 3 is the third installment of the "NFL Street" series, which  American football wide receiver, was an official spokesperson of the game?
input_dict.source_summary: Chad Johnson (also known as Chad Ochocinco)
input_dict.target_summary: Summary_1 stated that "Chad Johnson (also known as Chad Ochocinco) was the official spokesperson." Second-hop supporting evidence: (1) NFL Street 3: "Chad Johnson of the Cincinnati Bengals appears on the cover and was the official spokesperson of the game." (2) Chad Johnson: "Chad Javon Johnson ..., formerly Chad Ochocinco, is a former American football wide receiver." Integrated evidence: Chad Javon Johnson (formerly Chad Ochocinco), a former American football wide receiver associated with the Cincinnati Bengals, appears on the cover of NFL Street 3 and is identified as the game's official spokesperson.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Chad Johnson (also known as Chad Ochocinco) was the official spokesperson for NFL Street 3. He appears on the game's cover and is named as its official spokesperson (NFL Street 3), and he is described as an American football wide receiver formerly known as Chad Ochocinco (Chad Johnson (disambiguation)). Chad Johnson (formerly Chad Ochocinco) is an American football wide receiver who served as the game's official spokesperson.
